UNDERTAKING 
 
No refurbished / Old components used  
 
 
We, M/s INSPIRE I-TECH SERVICES PVT. LTD., OEM of “i-Comp” brand Desktop Computers hereby declare that 
all components used in the manufacturing of our Products are brand new, original, and have not been 
refurbished, recycled, or previously used in any manner. 
 
We certify that: 
 
No refurbished, old, or used components have been incorporated into the product. All parts meet the required 
industry standards and the product complies with all applicable quality and safety regulations. 
 
This Certificate of Undertaking has been issued as per the requirement under the above referred Gem Bid. 
 
 
For INSPIRE I-TECH SERVICES PVT. LTD.

DECLARATION FOR FACTORY PRE-LOADED GENUINE OS 
 
 
We, M/S INSPIRE I-TECH SERVICES PVT. LTD., OEM OF “i-comp” Brand Desktop Computers, are 
authorized Microsoft Direct OEM and hereby certify that the Desktops being supplied by us will be shipped 
with genuine Microsoft Windows 11 Home Operating System factory preloaded. 
 
We, declare that the Microsoft Windows Operating System provided with the offered systems is 
genuine, licensed, and preloaded at the factory by us as the OEM. 
 
We are happy to share herewith the Microsoft GPA (Global Partner Agreement) between INSPIRE & 
MICROSOFT for your ready reference. 
 
This declaration is bid-specific and made in reference to your requirement for genuine factory 
preloaded OS as per the above-mentioned GEM Bid. 
 
 
Thanking you, 
 
AUTHORISED SIGNATORY 
Name : Bishnu Singhania  
Designation : Business Head 
Email ID : bsinghania@iitindia.com

Dear  AMRITA MOHUNTA,
Microsoft India Corporation (“Microsoft”), hereby confirms that as of the date of this letter, INSPIRE I-
TECH SERVICES PRIVATE LIMITED (“Company”) is currently licensed by Microsoft under a Microsoft Global 
Partner Agreement (“GPA Terms”) to distribute the software products set forth in the license agreement. 
In accordance with the GPA Terms, Company, as an authorized distributor of Microsoft software products 
(“Microsoft Software”), may install the Microsoft Software onto Company computer devices and distribute 
the Microsoft Software together with the computer devices. 
You may provide this letter to authorized governmental agencies, customs authorities and/or regulatory 
authorities on a need-to-know basis as may be required for the sole purpose of confirming Company’s right 
to preinstall and distribute the Microsoft Software licensed under the GPA Terms with computer devices, 
and provided that this letter is treated as confidential information under a confidentiality agreement 
between Company and such agency or authority, as appropriate. 
Sincerely,
George Hawk
Contracts & Billing Group Manager, Consumer Operations
Account Manager (cc via email):  v-saupatil@microsoft.com

Malicious Code Certificate 
 
 
 
Malicious Code Certificate: 
 
 (a) This is to certify that the Hardware and the Software being offered, as part of the contract, does not 
contain Embedded Malicious code that would activate procedures to :- 
(i) Inhibit the desires and designed function of the equipment. 
(ii) Cause physical damage to the user or equipment during the exploitation. 
(iii) Tap information resident or transient in the equipment/network. 
(b) The firm will be considered to be in breach of the procurement contract, in case physical damage, loss 
of information or infringements related to copyright and Intellectual Property Right (IPRs) are caused due 
to activation of any such malicious code in embedded software. 
 
 
For INSPIRE I-TECH SERVICES PVT. LTD.

UNDERTAKING 
 
Spare support for 5 years 
 
 
We, M/s INSPIRE I-TECH SERVICES PVT. LTD., OEM of “i-Comp” brand Desktop Computers hereby declare that 
spare support for the offered product model ISPIRARE URZE IXX, shall be available for a minimum period of 5 
(five) years from the date of installation. This includes 3 (three) years under standard warranty support. 
 
The additional 2 (two) years of spare support shall be provided on a chargeable basis, as per the diagnosis and 
recommendations made by our authorized service engineers. 
 
This Certificate of Undertaking has been issued as per the requirement under the above referred Gem Bid. 
 
 
For INSPIRE I-TECH SERVICES PVT. LTD.

UNDERTAKING 
 
Warranty Certificate 
 
 
 
We, INSPIRE I-TECH SERVICES PVT. LTD., OEM of “i-Comp” brand Desktop Computer undertakes that we will be 
providing Warranty as per the terms and condition of the said bid. 
 
We will offer 3 years onsite warranty of our offered product. The warranty shall cover 100% efficiency of the 
product supplied by the bidder of “i-comp”. 
 
We are a Registered Company having our Registered Office in India and have complete set-up to provide After 
Sales Support in India. We also undertake that we have proven facilities for Training, repair, and Service Center 
Support in India at least for the past three years.  
 
This Certificate of Undertaking has been issued as per the requirement under the above referred Gem Bid. 
 
 
For INSPIRE I-TECH SERVICES PVT. LTD.

Subject :- Bureau Of Energy Efficiency Voluntary Scheme for Energy Efficiency
labelling ,May 2006., Authorization To use The Label.
Dear Sir,
1.   With Reference to your application submitted to BEE Office for participation in Bureau Of
Energy Efficiency Voluntary Scheme For energy efficiency Labelling May 2006 scheme. The
Bureau here by authorizes you to use the BEE Label strictly in accordance with the provision
of scheme subject to time payment of prescribed fees. The competent authority has authorized
usage of label from 19th December, 2024 . The permission shall be valid from 19th
December, 2024 to 17th December, 2027 .
2.   This authorization carries the rights and obligations stipulated in the scheme. In pursuance
of obligation, you shall pay in due manner and time the scheduled labelling fee as set out in
the scheme. The Bureau shall at any time During the operation of the scheme ,decide to
amend, revise ,modify or terminate the scheme by giving three month prior notice and you will
be bound to comply with such amendment ,revision ,modification within such period , as may
be prescribed by the Bureau.
